message:
fix(freeze): enable native Array.push optimization in force_stack_mode

- Remove force_stack_mode guard from tryEmitNativeArrayPush,
  tryEmitNativeCharCodeAt, and tryEmitNativeStringSlice since
  stack layout is the same regardless of mode
- Add shouldSkipForNativeArrayPush to skip redundant get_field2("push")
  emission when native optimization will handle it inline
- Fix hot path wrapper signature to include cpool parameter
- Fix vstack/stack handling: materialize before swap, update base_stack_depth
- Fix dup handler to track via base_stack_depth instead of vstack
- Fix loop back-edge to update existing slot instead of pushing

Benchmarks:
- fib: 2857ms (2.7x faster than Node.js)
- prime_factors: 4.57ms (was 4.70ms, Array.push optimization now triggers)
- mandelbrot: 14.21ms (was crashing with SIGSEGV, now works)
